summary: Iteration 49 - Admin Matches Section with 2 Sub-Tabs COMPLETE. All features verified: (1) 2 sub-tabs visible: Matches and Contests, (2) Each tab has 3 sections: LIVE, UPCOMING/OPEN, COMPLETED/LOCKED, (3) PBKS vs GT shows as UPCOMING with '31 Mar, 07:30 pm IST' date, (4) Match card expands to show venue, date, status text, and 3 actions (Make Live, Add Contest, Make Unlive), (5) Match status toggle works (upcomingтЖТlive, liveтЖТupcoming), (6) Add Contest form with template dropdown and name input, (7) Contest card shows 5 action buttons (Make Live/Unlive, AI Resolve, AI Answers, Manual, Delete), (8) Contest status toggle works (openтЖТliveтЖТopen), (9) Template badge clickable to expand 16 questions with Hindi text, (10) Difficulty badges: MEDIUM (yellow), HARD (red) with points. Backend: 16/17 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI flows verified.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminMatchPage.jsx: Well-structured with 2 sub-tabs (Matches/Contests) using pill buttons
IST timezone conversion using toLocaleString with 'Asia/Kolkata' timezone - correct implementation
Match status transitions properly validated in backend (VALID_TRANSITIONS dict)
Contest status transitions: open/live/locked cycle works correctly
Max 5 contests per match enforced in both frontend (UI count) and backend (400 error)
Template badge clickable to expand 16 questions with Hindi text
Difficulty badges: MEDIUM (yellow), HARD (red) with points displayed
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 verified Admin Matches section rebuild with 2 sub-tabs. Key verified features: 1) Admin login flow works (Get Started тЖТ Phone тЖТ PIN тЖТ Admin Dashboard). 2) Matches bottom nav тЖТ 2 sub-tabs: Matches and Contests. 3) Matches tab has 3 sections: LIVE (0), UPCOMING (47), COMPLETED (collapsed). 4) Contests tab has 3 sections: LIVE, OPEN, COMPLETED/LOCKED. 5) PBKS vs GT shows as UPCOMING with '31 Mar, 07:30 pm IST' date. 6) Match card expands to show venue, full date, status text, and 3 action buttons. 7) Match status toggle: upcomingтЖТlive (Make Live), liveтЖТupcoming (Make Unlive). 8) Add Contest form: template dropdown, name input, Create button. 9) Contest card shows 5 action buttons: Make Live/Unlive, AI Resolve, AI Answers, Manual, Delete. 10) Contest status toggle: openтЖТliveтЖТopen works. 11) Template badge 'Full Match Predictions (16Q)' clickable to expand questions. 12) 16 questions display with Hindi text and difficulty badges. 13) Sync IPL Schedule button works. 14) Max 5 contests per match enforced. 15) 70 total matches (3 completed, 67 upcoming, 0 live currently).
